name: standards-refresh.sh assembles a source whose extracted segments exceed the kernel per-argument exec limit as real documentation-scale pages produce
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r50-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out && python3 -c " body = ''.join('

Guidance rule number %d of many

%s

' % (i, 'This documentation section states one mandatory guidance sentence. ' * 40) for i in range(80)) open('$OUT/s.html', 'w').write('

Doc

' + body + '') " && cat > $OUT/reg.yaml <e.err; rc=$?; T=$OUT/out/node/r50-src.yaml; [ $rc -eq 0 ] && [ -f $T ] && [ "$(grep -c '^- id:' $T | tr -d ' ')" = "80" ] && grep -q 'rule_count=80' e.err && echo large-yield-assembles-clean 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
